lora.result: Learned the concise citation style — shifted output from verbose attribution ('This information is found on page 8...') to the clean target format '(source, p.8)'.
lora.before: The Transformer big model achieved a BLEU score of 41.0 on English-to-French. This information is from page 8, specifically Table 2.
lora.after: The Transformer (big) model achieved 28.4 BLEU on English-to-German and 41.0 BLEU on English-to-French. (source, p.8)

dpo.result: Trained to strong preference metrics and verified via adapter diagnostics (all 112 LoRA matrices non-zero, 5.83 logit shift vs base). Effect was below the threshold to change greedy-decoded text — a real but sub-surface preference shift.
dpo.lesson: Strong training metrics don't guarantee visible output change; verifying at the weight/logit level (not just eyeballing text) is essential.
